items.reason: Implemented normalization logic for author detection and updated the PR description to accurately reflect the scope of changes.
items.summary: Fixed author detection normalization and updated documentation.
items.why: Consistency between code and description is essential for reviewer trust.

items.reason: Swapped the order of toolchain and runtime checks in scripts/dependency-automation.js as suggested.
items.why: Prevents toolchain updates from being misclassified due to prefix matching.

items.reason: Updated PR description to explicitly highlight the new auto-merge policy for non-major updates.
items.summary: Added policy change details to PR description.
items.why: Ensures reviewers are aware of the increased automation risk posture.

items.reason: Included inbox lifecycle automation in the PR description.
items.summary: Added inbox automation details to PR description.
items.why: Full transparency on all automation behavioral changes.

items.reason: Added a fork guard to the dependency-inbox workflow to prevent write-permission failures.
items.summary: Added fork guard to inbox workflow.
items.why: Improves CI robustness for community contributions.

items.reason: Removed redundant checkout steps from jobs that only use the gh CLI and inline node logic.
items.why: Speeds up workflow execution and reduces resource waste.

items.reason: Implemented robust author normalization that strips prefixes and suffixes before comparison.
items.why: Handles all Dependabot/automation login variants with a single canonical check.

items.reason: Consolidated author detection into a single normalized logic across all jobs.
items.why: Prevents list drift and improves maintainability of the workflow.
